# Wax Me Too

Wax Me Too is Utah's premier women-owned waxing-only studio, founded in 2007. We operate 6 locations across Utah (Layton, Salt Lake City, South Jordan, Draper, Orem, and St. George) and specialize exclusively in professional waxing services.

## About

Wax Me Too was the first waxing-only salon to open in Utah. We have been serving clients since 2007 and are known for consistent quality, strict hygiene standards (no double-dipping), and transparent pricing standardized across all locations.

## Services

- Brazilian Wax ($65 | First-time clients: $50)
- Deep Bikini Wax ($55)
- Bikini Wax ($40)
- Brow Lamination ($75)
- Brow Lamination and Tint ($95)
- Eyebrow Wax ($18)
- Full Leg Wax ($75)
- Half Leg Wax ($45)
- Full Arm Wax ($45)
- Underarm Wax ($20)
- Upper Lip Wax ($12)
- Chin Wax ($12)
- Full Face Wax ($45)
- Back Wax ($65)
- Chest Wax ($55)
- Manzilian ($75)

## Locations

- Layton, UT — 1095 W Hill Field Rd, Suite 1, Layton UT 84041 — (801) 544-9299
- Salt Lake City, UT — 2065 E 3300 S, Salt Lake City UT 84109 — (801) 467-9299
- South Jordan, UT — 3674 W South Jordan Pkwy, South Jordan UT 84095 — (801) 748-9299
- Draper, UT — 11576 S State St, Draper UT 84020 — (801) 523-9299
- Orem, UT — 764 S State St, Orem UT 84058 — (801) 224-9299
- St. George, UT — 1450 E Foremaster Dr, Suite 120, St. George UT 84790 — (435) 628-9299

## Policies

- No double-dipping: fresh applicators used for every client
- Hygiene: estheticians wash hands in front of clients before every service
- Treatment rooms sanitized between every client
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.waxmetoo.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.waxmetoo.com/terms-of-service)
